Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I remember hearing a piano[n]piece played here once.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The melody will stay with me forever...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can see a piano inside through[n]the frosted glass window...[n]{f 1 1}
